name_en: 🆕 Chip Version.💕 Top-tier Original M12239 This Rosalie coin purse features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot in a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, creating an exquisite gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped metal clasp to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.
name_cn:
🆕 Chip Version.💕 Top-tier Original M12239 This Rosalie coin purse features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot in a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, creating an exquisite gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped metal clasp to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.
8 x 2.5 x 11 cm
(H x W x D)
Monogram pattern
Coated canvas
Grainy calfskin lining
Metal hardware
Vivienne-shaped metal clasp closure
Accordion pockets
Zip coin pocket
Patch pocket
Card slots
